languages.text: "Но как... предстану... троном... Его?" {n}Старик замирает, после чего начинает биться о палубу с удвоенной силой, что-то нечленораздельно вопя.{/n} "Изотру-у-у... тело... об муки! Как пару с-с-сандалий... По-потерян... Потеря-я-ян!"

"But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"
languages.original_text: "Но как... предстану... троном... Его?" {n}Старик замирает, после чего начинает биться о палубу с удвоенной силой, что-то нечленораздельно вопя.{/n} "Изотру-у-у... тело... об муки! Как пару с-с-сандалий... По-потерян... Потеря-я-ян!"

traits.locale_text: "But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"

"But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"
"But how will I... stand before the... Throne? His Throne? My aaagony will wear through... this foreign body! Like a pair of sandals... And if not, I am lost... Lost!"

"But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"

"But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"

languages.text: 「しかし、私はどのようにして神の御前に立つことができるでしょうか。私の苦しみは、この異物のように、靴のようにすり減っていくでしょう。これは、私の道を見つける唯一の方法です。そうでなければ、私は迷子です。迷子です！」
languages.original_text: "But how shall I stand before His throne? My agony will wear through this foreign body like a pair of sandals... This is the only way to find my path. Otherwise I am lost. Lost!"

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、私はどのようにして神の御前に立つことができるでしょうか。私の苦しみは、この異物のように、靴のようにすり減っていくでしょう。これは、私の道を見つける唯一の方法です。そうでなければ、私は迷子です。迷子です！」

languages.text: “但我该如何……立于……祂的……黄金王座之前？”{n}他先是僵住，随后开始加倍用力地拿头猛撞甲板，发出支离破碎的嘶喊：{/n}“我的痛苦……会磨穿……这具躯体！就像磨穿一双……破凉鞋……我迷失了……迷失了！”
languages.original_text: "But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"

traits.locale_text: “但我该如何……立于……祂的……黄金王座之前？”{n}他先是僵住，随后开始加倍用力地拿头猛撞甲板，发出支离破碎的嘶喊：{/n}“我的痛苦……会磨穿……这具躯体！就像磨穿一双……破凉鞋……我迷失了……迷失了！”

languages.text: « Mais comment pourrais-je... me tenir... devant Son... devant Son trône ? » {n}Il se fige, puis commence à se frapper la tête contre le pont avec une force redoublée, hurlant des propos décousus :{/n} « Ce corps portera... ma douleur... Comme une paire de s-sandales... Je suis perdu... p-perdu ! »
languages.original_text: "But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"

traits.locale_text: « Mais comment pourrais-je... me tenir... devant Son... devant Son trône ? » {n}Il se fige, puis commence à se frapper la tête contre le pont avec une force redoublée, hurlant des propos décousus :{/n} « Ce corps portera... ma douleur... Comme une paire de s-sandales... Je suis perdu... p-perdu ! »

languages.text: «Pero ¿cómo puedo... presentarme ante... Su trono?». {n}Se detiene y empieza a dar cabezazos contra la cubierta con fuerzas renovadas, gritando de dolor.{/n} «Mi agonía... atravesará... mi cuerpo! Como un par de sandaliasss... estoy perdido... ¡Per... perdido!».
languages.original_text: "But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"

traits.locale_text: «Pero ¿cómo puedo... presentarme ante... Su trono?». {n}Se detiene y empieza a dar cabezazos contra la cubierta con fuerzas renovadas, gritando de dolor.{/n} «Mi agonía... atravesará... mi cuerpo! Como un par de sandaliasss... estoy perdido... ¡Per... perdido!».

languages.text: "Peki O'nun... Tahtının huzuruna... nasıl çıkacağım?" {n}Donup kalıyor, ardından iki kat güçle kafasını güverteye vurmaya başlıyor ve kesik kesik kelimelerle çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Iz... Dırabım... Bu bedeni... Yıpratacak! Bir çift ça... Çarık gibi... Kayboldum ben... Ka... Kayboldum!"
languages.original_text: "But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"

traits.locale_text: "Peki O'nun... Tahtının huzuruna... nasıl çıkacağım?" {n}Donup kalıyor, ardından iki kat güçle kafasını güverteye vurmaya başlıyor ve kesik kesik kelimelerle çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Iz... Dırabım... Bu bedeni... Yıpratacak! Bir çift ça... Çarık gibi... Kayboldum ben... Ka... Kayboldum!"

languages.text: "Aber wie ... werde ich vor ... Seinem ... Thron stehen?" {n}Er erstarrt, ehe er seinen Kopf noch heftiger auf den Boden schlägt und brüllt:{/n} "Mein Schmerz ... wird diesen Körper ... durchscheuern ... Wie ein Paar Sandalen ... Ich bin verloren ... V-verloren!"
languages.original_text: "But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"

traits.locale_text: "Aber wie ... werde ich vor ... Seinem ... Thron stehen?" {n}Er erstarrt, ehe er seinen Kopf noch heftiger auf den Boden schlägt und brüllt:{/n} "Mein Schmerz ... wird diesen Körper ... durchscheuern ... Wie ein Paar Sandalen ... Ich bin verloren ... V-verloren!"
